items.title: Help — first strength-3 glyph isn't holding
items.summary: Demo thread. New walker asks why the layered glyph keeps decomposing. Three replies. Resolution: use glyphDiv before glyphAdd.

items.title: Anyone else seeing the southern arc thin?
items.summary: Demo thread. Several walkers compare field-line observations at dawn. Captain Ren has not commented (yet).

items.title: Kael's combat-style recipe ladder
items.summary: Demo thread. Discussion of Kael Torchlight's fire-discipline recipe progression. Seven replies, two arguments.

items.title: Has Brackish told you about Velka's off-ledger?
items.summary: Demo thread. Walkers comparing what Brackish has shared. Mostly cheerful gossip. One concerned reply.

items.title: What's in the lacquered box?
items.summary: Demo thread. Speculation about Lady Seraphine's lacquered-box courier quest. Spoiler tag respected.

items.title: First Cycle complete — what now?
items.summary: Demo thread. New walker who finished cook-eat-fight-commune asks for direction. Five reply chains pointing to different surfaces.
